headline: ANTHROPIC SHIPS CLAUDE FABLE 5 — FIRST PUBLIC 'MYTHOS-CLASS' MODEL, 'EXCEEDS ANY MODEL WE'VE MADE GENERALLY AVAILABLE'
FABLE 5 ROUTES HIGH-RISK CYBER/BIO/CHEM QUERIES TO OPUS 4.8 — SAFETY FALLBACK IN UNDER 5% OF SESSIONS
ANTHROPIC ALSO LAUNCHES MYTHOS 5 — SAME MODEL, SAFEGUARDS LIFTED, RESTRICTED TO GLASSWING PARTNERS
FABLE 5 PRICED ~2X OPUS 4.8 AT $10/$50 PER MILLION TOKENS — FREE ON PAID PLANS ONLY UNTIL JUNE 22, THEN CREDITS
REPORTS: FABLE 5 IMPOSES MANDATORY 30-DAY DATA RETENTION, OVERRIDING ENTERPRISE ZERO-RETENTION CONTRACTS
ANTHROPIC SELF-REPORTS FABLE 5 AT 80.3% ON SWE-BENCH PRO VS GPT-5.5 58.6% AND GEMINI 3.1 PRO 54.2% — NO INDEPENDENT EVAL YET
